since_last: 42% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.00%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.68% · Gold +0.42% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 42% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.00%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.00%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +10.45%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +10.45%, ASML +4.45%, TLN +3.63%, INTC +3.62%, MU +3.49%. Laggards: SNAP -8.93%, CRNC -6.11%, SMR -4.80%, OKLO -4.49%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.62% at $207.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
